description_long: This airplane features a highly angular, futuristic design with sharp, swept-back wings and an elongated, pointed nose. The wings are mid-mounted and display pronounced anhedral angles, extending outward and slightly downward, with additional fin-like structures near the rear. The tail section is distinctive, with a prominent vertical stabilizer and twin horizontal stabilizers, giving it an aggressive, high-performance appearance. The cockpit is positioned forward on the fuselage and is enclosed with a faceted canopy, suggesting a single-seat configuration. The surface appears metallic and smooth, with a uniform silvery-gray coloration and minimal visible markings. No external landing gear is visible, indicating a possible retractable or stylized design.
description: A sleek, angular, silvery-gray airplane with swept-back wings, a pointed nose, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. Its futuristic design features sharp lines, a prominent vertical tail, and a smooth metallic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and sharply swept wings with downward angles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated nose, mid-mounted wings, and the prominent vertical stabilizer at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin horizontal stabilizers, central vertical fin, and the wide wingspan with angular extensions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the sharp, layered wing structure and the streamlined fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept, angular wings featuring pronounced anhedral angles and additional rear fin-like extensions.
attribute_engine_type: No visible external engines; likely integrated jet or turbofan configuration within the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single prominent vertical stabilizer and twin horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; likely retractable configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a faceted canopy.
